prompt: A cinematic ancient Egypt portrait of a glamorous queen-like woman kneeling on warm desert sand beside a large black panther in the courtyard of a sandstone temple. The woman has {argument name="hair color" default="jet black"} long wavy hair, medium-brown skin, and wears an ornate Egyptian gold headband with a central turquoise jewel and sun-disc detail, long rectangular gold earrings, a wide layered Egyptian collar in gold and blue, multiple gold armbands and bracelets, and a revealing ivory-and-gold draped outfit with gemstone ornaments, delicate gold chain adornments across the torso, a jeweled belt, and strappy sandals. Her pose is elegant and grounded, one hand resting on the sand, knees folded to one side, body angled slightly toward the viewer. Beside her is 1 sleek black panther with subtle rosette patterning and bright amber eyes, lying sphinx-like in the foreground, calm, regal, and protective. The setting includes 3 massive carved temple columns in the background with hieroglyphic and animal relief details, softly out of focus. Golden-hour sunlight, warm sandstone tones, realistic skin and fabric textures, dramatic yet natural shadows, shallow depth of field, ultra-detailed, photorealistic, luxurious, mythic atmosphere, centered vertical composition, full-body seated figure with animal companion.
translatedPrompt: 一幅电影质感的古埃及肖像，描绘了一位魅力十足、女王般的女性，跪在温暖的沙漠沙地上，身旁是一只巨大的黑豹，背景是砂岩神庙的庭院。这位女性拥有 {argument name="hair color" default="乌黑"} 的长波浪卷发，中棕色皮肤，佩戴着华丽的埃及金质头带，头带中央镶嵌着绿松石和太阳圆盘细节，戴着长方形金耳环、宽大的金蓝色叠层埃及领饰、多条金质臂环和手镯，身着露肤的象牙白与金色垂坠服饰，躯干上有精致的金链装饰、镶嵌宝石的腰带以及系带凉鞋。她的姿态优雅而沉稳，一只手撑在沙地上，双膝侧向一旁，身体略微朝向观众。她身旁是一只毛色油亮、带有隐约玫瑰花纹、双眼呈琥珀色的黑豹，它像狮身人面像一样卧在前景中，神态平静、高贵且具有保护性。背景中包括 3 根巨大的雕刻神庙石柱，上面饰有象形文字和动物浮雕，呈现出柔和的虚化效果。黄金时段的阳光，温暖的砂岩色调，逼真的皮肤和织物纹理，戏剧性而自然的阴影，浅景深，超高细节，写实风格，奢华且充满神话氛围，居中垂直构图，全身坐姿人物与动物伙伴。

breakdown.creativeCore: 古埃及女王与黑豹：一幅以古埃及为灵感的皇室女性与黑豹并肩的写实奇幻肖像，非常适合电影级角色艺术和神话奢华风格的视觉创作。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, full-body, layered, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic, cinematic]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: shallow depth, depth of field]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
